title: Swal
description: A mod that benefits the player and hinder in most of the cases the player.
body:
• What is this about •

  • Swal mod is an miscellaneous mod
  • There are some new mobs
  • And new armors and items
  • So is kind of random things

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• What mods/loaders do you need •

  • You need GeckoLib.
  • You need will need JEI(Just enough items) for some of the recipes.
  • You need Forge.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Credits •

  • This was made by Swalapot with the use of MCreator

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Language •

  • English (En)
  • Español (Es)
  • No more for now / No más por ahora

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Permissions •

  • You can suggest any ideas
  • You can tell about bugs/crashes you gave
  • You are not allowed to re-upload this mod
  • You can use this mod in videos or streams

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Literature... •

  • Have fun? 🐩
